summary: Completed frontend testing of Partner UX + Profile Dropdown Pack. All features working correctly: Partner Ecosystem V2 page renders with table/card toggle, PartnerViewToggle switches views, PartnerSpecificServicesField accepts comma-separated input, profile dropdowns work in Partner and Customer portals with Log Out functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Added data-testid attributes to PartnerViewToggle, PartnerSpecificServicesField, and PartnerProfileDropdown components for better testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner UX + Profile Dropdown Pack fully tested. Profile dropdowns work in Partner and Customer portals with logout functionality. Table/card toggle works on /admin/partner-ecosystem-v2 page.

/admin/partner-ecosystem-v2 page renders.details: Page title 'Partner Ecosystem' displays, Table/Cards toggle buttons present in top right, table view is default

PartnerViewToggle component switches bet.details: Clicking Cards button hides table and shows partner cards, clicking Table button restores table view

PartnerSpecificServicesField allows comm.details: Textarea accepts comma-separated values, parsed services preview shows entered values correctly

Partner portal shows PartnerAccountTopba.details: Partner Workspace title in topbar, profile dropdown button (circular P) in top right, dropdown opens with menu items

Customer portal shows profile dropdown i.details: Customer Portal title in header, profile dropdown button (circular C) in top right, dropdown has Orders/Invoices/Help menu items and Log Out button

Profile dropdown has menu items and Log.details: Partner dropdown: Affiliate Dashboard, Vendor Dashboard, Help, Log Out. Customer dropdown: Orders, Invoices, Help, Log Out

Service partner rule displays: SKU catal.details: Partner Setup Rules section shows 'Service partners do not need SKU catalog fields' message, amber warning shows 'SKU, partner catalog settings, and global available quantity should not be used for service-only partners'

Logout functionality from profile dropdo.details: Partner logout redirects to /partner-login, Customer logout redirects to home page
